note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left foot wound site, rates 2/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left foot measures 4.3 cm x 2.4 cm x 1.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 38% slough, 62% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left foot — not improving.
Plan: Debridement consult ordered. Continue current dressing regimen.
